title: Add Tribe Availability Enquiry Form with Results (Step 1 + Step 2)

requirements.text: Seed a mock technician database in the Motoko backend with at least 15 sample technician profiles. Each profile must include: name, designation (from a predefined roles list), city, contact number, and availability date range. Spread profiles across at least 4 different cities and cover all predefined roles. This data should be stored in a stable variable so it can be easily replaced later.

quotes: yes please create a mock database which can be deleted easily later
Mock technician database seeded with sample profiles across multiple cities and roles

acceptanceCriteria: At least 15 technician records exist in a stable backend variable
Each record has name, designation, city, contact number, and availability dates
Profiles span at least 4 cities (e.g., Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore, Chennai)
All predefined roles (Cinematographer, Editor, Gaffer, Sound Recordist, Art Director, etc.) are represented
A backend query function exists to search technicians by city and list of roles

requirements.text: Add a backend query function `searchTechnicians` that accepts shoot city, shoot date range, available-from date, and a list of required roles, and returns matching technicians split into two groups: same-city matches and other-city matches. Each result record must include name, designation, city, and contact number.

quotes: results split into same-city and other-city technicians

acceptanceCriteria: Function accepts: shootCity (Text), shootStartDate (Time), shootEndDate (Time), availableFrom (Time), roles ([Text])
Returns a record with two arrays: sameCityResults and otherCityResults
Each result item contains: name, designation, city, contactNumber
Technicians are matched if their availability overlaps with the requested dates and their designation matches any of the requested roles
Same-city results contain only technicians whose city matches shootCity (case-insensitive)

requirements.text: In the Tribe Availability card on the Landing Page (the card with the calendar icon and text 'Sync your calendar with the tribe...'), add a CTA button labeled 'Find Available Crew'. This button must only be visible and enabled for authenticated users whose account type is Director or Production House. Users who are not logged in or have a different account type should see the button in a disabled or hidden state with a tooltip explaining the restriction.

quotes: add a cta link where users registered as Production house or director can look for technicians
it should be shown in the section shown in the image

acceptanceCriteria: The CTA button 'Find Available Crew' appears inside the Tribe Availability card on the Landing Page
Button is only active/visible for authenticated users with account type Director or Production House
Non-qualifying users see a disabled button or tooltip explaining access is restricted to Directors and Production Houses
Clicking the button opens the enquiry form (inline within the section or as a modal)

requirements.text: Build the Tribe Availability enquiry form with the following fields: (1) Project Name (text input), (2) Director Name (text input, shown when account type is Director), (3) Production House Name (text input, shown when account type is Production House), (4) Shoot City (text input), (5) Shoot Dates (date range picker: start date and end date), (6) Available From (single date picker), (7) Technicians Needed (multi-select dropdown using a predefined roles list — Cinematographer, Editor, Gaffer, Sound Recordist, Art Director, Colourist, Production Designer, Costume Designer, Makeup Artist, Stunt Coordinator, VFX Supervisor, Drone Operator, Focus Puller, Clapper Loader, Script Supervisor — users can add multiple roles as an array), (8) Special Requirements (textarea). The form should be shown inline in the Tribe Availability section below the CTA button or in a modal.

quotes: Project Name, director name, production house name, Shoot City, Shoot Dates. To available from date, list of technicians needed in a dropbox style, they can keep adding an array of technicians in one go, any special requirements

acceptanceCriteria: All 8 form fields are present and functional
Director Name field shows only when account type is Director; Production House Name shows only when account type is Production House
Technicians Needed field is a multi-select dropdown with the full predefined roles list; selected roles appear as removable tags/chips
Shoot Dates accepts a start and end date
Available From is a single date picker
Form has a Submit/Search button
All required fields are validated before submission

requirements.text: After the enquiry form is submitted, display the search results inline below the form within the same Tribe Availability section. Results must be split into two clearly labelled sections: 'Same City' and 'Other Cities'. Each technician result card should show name, designation, city, and contact number. If no technicians are found in either category, show an appropriate empty state message for that category.

quotes: Results shown on the same page after submission, split into Same City and Other Cities sections

acceptanceCriteria: After form submission, results appear below the form without navigating away
Results are split into 'Same City' and 'Other Cities' sections with clear headings
Each result card displays: name, designation, city, contact number
Empty state message shown if no matches found in a category
A loading/spinner state is shown while the query is in progress
User can modify the form and resubmit to get updated results

constraints: The mock technician database must be stored in a stable variable in the Motoko backend so it can be cleanly replaced with real data later
The enquiry form and results must appear within the existing Tribe Availability card/section on the Landing Page — do not create a separate page
Only authenticated users with account type Director or Production House may submit the enquiry form
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Real technician data or live integrations — mock data only
Email or push notifications to technicians
Admin panel for managing technician records
